business_visual_evidence_records.observable_business_object: editable launch deck preview on a presentation workbench
business_visual_evidence_records.reader_question_answered: What product is being launched, and why should a buyer believe it is more than prompt-only slides?
business_visual_evidence_records.business_claim_to_make_visible: The product can convert design evidence into an editable launch presentation.
minimum_visual_specificity_checks: names a concrete product or business object before drawing
uses at least three role-specific surface slots
anchors proof copy to visible object regions instead of detached cards
forbids generic geometric diagram as the primary visual answer
business_visual_evidence_records.bad_control_probe: Bad control fails if it can satisfy the slide with generic blocks and no inspectable product object.
